description: CompositionPink, green and white striped sweater made of 100% cotton, has a round ribbed neck, long raglan sleeves with ribbed cuffs and brand logo embroidered on the ribbed hemFittingRegularWash careWash dark colours separately at less than 40 degreesDo not tumble dry or bleachDry in shadeWarm iron; do not iron on print/trims/logoGet ready for the chilly weather in this striped sweater from adidas. The long sleeves and ribbed hem adds to your feminine sporty  appeal, while the cotton fabric keeps you feeling warm and comfortable all day long. Team this with jeans and ballerina flats for a sweet, preppy look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in sweatersHeight: 5'7"; Chest: 33"; Waist: 25"
